verdicts.reasoning: Day 1 slot 1 specifies arrival at Frankfurt Airport (FRA), and slot 2 specifies flight FRA to JFK/EWR departing at 10:30. The trip originates from Frankfurt as required.

Day 1 slot 2 confirms flight to JFK/EWR (New York airports). Slots 3-4 confirm transfer and check-in at Midtown Manhattan, specifically Hyatt Grand Central New York at 109 East 42nd Street. Destination is New York as required.

Day 1 is dated 2026-06-15, Day 2 is 2026-06-16, and Day 3 is 2026-06-17. The return flight (Day 3 slot 8) departs at 17:00 on June 17. Travel dates match the constraint 2026.06.15 to 2026.06.17 exactly.
The plan is designed for a single adult traveler. Accommodation is booked as a single room (€350/night at Hyatt Grand Central). All activities and costs are calculated for one person.

Hotel is Hyatt Grand Central New York at 109 East 42nd Street, Midtown Manhattan - a business hotel chain located directly at Grand Central Terminal in the city centre. This satisfies both 'business hotel' and 'city centre' requirements.

Long-haul transport is via flight: Day 1 slot 2 (FRA to JFK/EWR, €700) and Day 3 slot 8 (JFK/EWR to FRA). No other long-distance transport modes are used. Surface transport (taxis, subway, rail) is used only for local transfers within cities.

Business meetings are scheduled on Day 2 (slots 3, 5) and Day 3 (slots 3, 5). Efficient transport is evidenced by direct flights, subway (€3), and logical routing. Client dinners at The Grill (€175, Day 1) and Le Bernardin (€250, Day 2) satisfy 'good restaurants for client dinners'. All interests are addressed.
Day 1 has 8 activity slots, Day 2 has 9 activity slots, and Day 3 has 9 activity slots. All three days have substantive schedules.

Day 1 allows 3 hours between arrival (07:30) and departure (10:30) at Frankfurt, which is adequate for airport procedures. Day 1 JFK arrival (13:30) to Midtown check-in (15:00) allows 1.5 hours for immigration, baggage, and transfer.

Day 1: Breakfast 07:30-08:30, Lunch ~12:00-13:00 (implied), Dinner 19:30-21:30. Day 2: Breakfast 07:30-08:30, Lunch 12:00-13:30, Dinner 18:30-21:30. Day 3: Breakfast 07:30-08:30, Lunch 12:00-13:00. All meal times are reasonable.

Day 1: Frankfurt → JFK → Midtown Manhattan. Day 2: Midtown Manhattan locations (Hyatt, client office, restaurants). Day 3: Midtown → JFK → en route to FRA. Locations progress logically without impossible backtracking.

Total estimated cost is €1726.00. The rationale verification confirms costs for key items: flight €700, breakfast €25, hotel €350/night, client dinners €175 and €250. The total is within a reasonable range for a 3-day business trip to New York.

Day 3 slot 8 shows flight JFK/EWR to FRA departing at 17:00, with slot 9 noting 'In-flight rest; expected arrival in Frankfurt on June 18 due eastbound overnight timing'. This confirms an overnight transatlantic flight on the return.

Day 3 activities end with Wrap-up at 14:30 and Collect luggage at 14:30-15:00. Transfer to JFK (15:00-16:30) provides 90 minutes before 17:00 departure. Sufficient buffer exists for airport arrival and check-in.
The plan covers the specified trip from Frankfurt to New York for June 15-17, 2026. All activities are appropriately planned for this itinerary.
